task: Rebuild Argument Map Editor with React Flow canvas
result: The React Flow implementation was already complete in the codebase. All requirements verified: React Flow canvas with dagre auto-layout (top-down), custom node components with color system (blue=claim, amber=support, green=evidence), zoom/pan/fit controls toolbar, directional edge arrows, inline editing, add/delete nodes, drag to rearrange, minimap, and same ArgumentMapNode data model. Implementation was merged to dev in commit b5c31cd13 (feat(web): use ArgumentMapEditor for argument_map step #2163).
